LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT CONFIRMS THE TENTATIVE RULING ON ALL ASPECTS EXCEPT FOR THE CFRA INTERFERENCE CLAIM. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED ON THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO THE CFRA INTERFERENCE CLAIM ON BEHALF OF ROBERT HALF AND DENIED AS TO THE REST.COUNSEL FOR MS. NGUYEN TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 437C(G) AND CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sheryl Marx, Esq. 310-294-9595 of Brock & Gonzales for Plaintiff Uyen Nguyen.
Bonnie Glatzer, Esq. 415-984-8333 of Nixon Peabody LLP for Defendant ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL INC.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares his inclination to grant the motion for summary adjudication as to the CFRA Interference claim. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling on all aspects except for the CFRA Interference claim. Motion for Summary Judgment is Denied. Motion for Summary Adjudication is Granted on the fifth cause of action as to the CFRA Interference Claim on behalf of Robert Half and Denied as to the rest.

Counsel for Ms. Nguyen to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
